verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was born in sin and lost but Jesus paid the cost And pardoned me from all iniquity So till I see His face I'll daily ask His grace To guide me on the path He planned for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Guide me lord through the day guide me Lord this I pray Through all hardships temptation and strife Guide me lord through Thy might guide me Lord by Thy light That Thy will might be done in my life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God loved us everyone and He gave His only son To save our souls from sin He gladly died So trust in Him today and He'll wash your sins away Then daily He will be your light and guide
